questions.stem_en: Doctor is related to Hospital in the same way as Teacher is related to:
questions.stem_hi: Doctor, Hospital से related है उसी तरह Teacher किससे related है?

options.label: A
options.trap_reason_en: Copied the first pair's second term instead of applying the same relation to Teacher.
options.trap_reason_hi: First pair का second term copy कर दिया, Teacher पर same relation apply नहीं किया।

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Picked the first pair's first term and broke the analogy relation.
options.trap_reason_hi: First pair का first term चुन लिया और analogy relation टूट गया।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Repeated the given third term instead of finding its related object/action/place.
options.trap_reason_hi: Given third term repeat कर दिया, उसका related object/action/place नहीं निकाला।

questions.explanation_method_en: Identify the relation Doctor -> Hospital; applying the same relation gives Teacher -> School. Therefore, answer = School.
questions.explanation_concept_en: Analogy questions test relation transfer. The word pair relation must remain identical in the second pair. Final answer is School.
questions.explanation_method_hi: Doctor -> Hospital relation पहचानें; same relation लगाने पर Teacher -> School मिलता है। अतः answer = School।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Analogy questions relation transfer test करते हैं। Second pair में relation same रहना चाहिए। Final answer School है।
